error_signature: The resource you are requesting could not be found
title: 404 error when accessing files in subfolders
symptom: When trying to read a file in a subfolder of a Google Cloud Storage bucket, a 404 error occurs. The file can be accessed from the root folder but not from the subfolder.
applies_when: File is located in a subfolder of the bucket
not_this_if: File is in the root folder
File can be accessed via HTTP GET
root_cause: The Google Cloud Storage node requires the correct encoding of the file path. When accessing files in subfolders, the '/' character must be URL-encoded as '%2F' to avoid misinterpretation of the path.
fix_steps: Open the Google Cloud Storage node settings
Replace all '/' characters in the file path with '%2F'
Try to access the file again
agent_instruction: Update the file path in the Google Cloud Storage node to use '%2F' instead of '/' for subfolder access.
